Research has shown that Heterotropa blumei possesses various health benefits, including its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, glycosides, and flavonoids, such as heterotropine and heterotropine glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
